description: `compose update` subcommand: Auto-detects npm install (PACKAGE_ROOT under `node_modules/`) vs git clone (`.git` at PACKAGE_ROOT). For npm: runs `npm install [-g] @smartmemory/compose@latest`. For git: refuses on dirty tree unless `--force`, runs `git fetch && git pull --ff-only`, prints before/after SHAs, runs `npm install`. Either path then re-runs `compose setup` and (if invoked inside `.compose/`) `compose init`. Aliased as `compose upgrade`.
